zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD价格运行在6.20附近，已跌破20日均线6.26，整体结构偏弱，短线呈低位窄幅震荡格局，市场动能不足，多空博弈较为谨慎。

MACD指标当前为-0.0253，仍处于零轴下方，空头动能占优。RSI暂无数据但结合价格弱势判断，反弹力度有限，短期缺乏明确趋势性信号。

下方关键支撑位位于6.20与6.18区域，一旦失守或将测试6.15低点；上方阻力集中在6.26均线及6.30整数关口，突破前难以扭转弱势结构。

操作上建议以区间思路为主，未有效突破6.26前避免追多，可在支撑附近轻仓博反弹并严格设置止损，若放量跌破6.18需顺势跟进空单。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading in a tight intraday range with a slight bearish tilt, reflecting ongoing consolidation near the lower boundary of the session. Price action around 6.205 shows repeated pressure near 6.20, while inability to sustain moves above 6.24–6.25 suggests fading bullish momentum. Structurally, the market is coiling under the 20-period SMA, indicating short-term weakness despite the absence of a sharp breakdown.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious tone. The MACD reading at -0.0253 signals negative momentum, with price action still trending below the zero line, suggesting sellers maintain control. Without RSI data, momentum confirmation is limited, but price behavior implies neutral-to-weak conditions rather than oversold extremes. The lack of a bullish crossover in MACD signal terms further supports a restrained recovery environment, where rallies are likely to face selling pressure unless volume expands significantly.

Key support is forming around 6.20, a psychological and intraday structural level where buyers have repeatedly stepped in. A breakdown below this zone opens the door toward 6.18 and potentially 6.15 as secondary support areas. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at the 20-SMA near 6.26032, followed by stronger supply around 6.28–6.30, where previous rejections have occurred and momentum has stalled.

From a trading perspective, the setup favors range-bound or reactive strategies rather than breakout chasing. Short-term traders may consider buying near 6.20 support with tight risk control, targeting a rebound toward 6.25–6.26, while bearish continuation setups become more attractive on a confirmed break below 6.20. Until price reclaims the SMA20 with strength, rallies are likely to remain corrective within a broader sideways-to-soft structure.
